brief.title: Hayward Clean Truck Check Outreach - SMS, Email, and Cold Call Tracking
brief.description: Human-in-the-loop outreach package for Hayward-area heavy-duty diesel prospects. Includes SMS and email drafts, call priority, CRM/Gumption import guidance, and compliance/dedupe gates.

campaign.name: Hayward Clean Truck Check - May 2026
campaign.service: Clean Truck Check mobile OBD and OVI smoke opacity testing
campaign.targetAudience: Tree service, concrete, trucking, freight, paving, towing, drilling, waste, and other fleets likely to operate diesel vehicles over 14,000 lbs GVWR.
campaign.missingLeadDetails: The prompt included the top 7 hot leads and top 15 warm leads only. Add the remaining 9 warm leads and 8 cool leads before a full 39-lead import.
campaign.externalActionReason: This workspace has no authenticated Gmail, SMS/Twilio, or Gumption/Manus write integration. gumption.manus.space is passcode protected. Assets are prepared for manual review/import.

requiredBeforeOutreach.detail: Verify each lead in Google Sheet Master CRM 1TdNnf7eLaPNN3anaBGpNdjo_unK04zWwZJ859ZDvIO4 before calling or messaging. Some may already be customers.

requiredBeforeOutreach.action: Confirm SMS consent and DNC status
requiredBeforeOutreach.detail: Do not send marketing SMS to leads without the required consent and opt-out handling. Keep STOP opt-out text in any SMS.
Add the business physical mailing address and unsubscribe mechanism before sending cold marketing email.
Upload briefs/hayward-clean-truck-check-cold-calls-2026-05-22.csv to the Master CRM Leads_2026-05-14 tab and to gumption.manus.space Cold Calls after unlocking the site.

sms.recommendedTiming: After dedupe and consent check, schedule no earlier than 2026-05-23 10:30 America/Los_Angeles.
sms.template: Hi {{business_name}}, Bryan w/ NorCal CARB Mobile. In {{city}} tomorrow for Clean Truck Checks. Diesels 14k+ GVWR? I can do mobile OBD + OVI same trip. Want a slot? Reply STOP to opt out
sms.hotVariant: Hi {{business_name}}, Bryan w/ NorCal CARB Mobile. I will be near {{city}} tomorrow doing Clean Truck Checks. If you run diesels 14k+ GVWR, I can do mobile OBD + OVI same trip. Want me to stop by? Reply STOP to opt out
sms.warmVariant: Hi {{business_name}}, Bryan w/ NorCal CARB Mobile. We do mobile Clean Truck Checks for 14k+ GVWR diesels: OBD + OVI smoke opacity. Want a quick quote? Reply STOP to opt out

email.previewText: Mobile OBD and OVI smoke opacity testing for 14k+ GVWR diesels.
email.bodyPlainText:
Hi {{contact_name}},

Bryan with NorCal CARB Mobile. I will be in {{city}} tomorrow doing Clean Truck Checks for fleets nearby.

If you have diesel trucks over 14,000 lbs GVWR, I can knock out mobile OBD testing and OVI smoke opacity checks on the same trip. We are mobile, available 24/7, and set up for fleet yards, shops, and job sites.

If this is useful, reply with the best person to coordinate with or call/text me at {{bryan_phone}} and I will see if I can fit you into the route.

Thanks,
Bryan
NorCal CARB Mobile
{{bryan_phone}}
https://norcalcarbmobile.com
{{physical_mailing_address}}

To stop receiving emails from us, reply with Unsubscribe.

voicemail.template: Hey {{business_name}}, Bryan with NorCal CARB Mobile. I will be in {{city}} tomorrow doing Clean Truck Checks for fleets right by you. If you have diesels over 14,000 lbs I can knock yours out same trip - mobile OBD and OVI smoke opacity, 24/7, 363 days a year. Call me before the State calls you. {{bryan_phone}}.

manualWorkflow: Open briefs/hayward-clean-truck-check-call-sheet-2026-05-22.html on a phone and tap numbers to call hot leads first.
Use briefs/hayward-clean-truck-check-cold-calls-2026-05-22.csv for Master CRM Leads_2026-05-14 import and Gumption Cold Calls tracking.
After dedupe, mark dedupe_status as clear, customer, duplicate, or do_not_contact.
Only schedule SMS for leads with consent/approved outreach status. Requested send time is 2026-05-23 10:30 America/Los_Angeles.
For emails, find/verify recipient email addresses first, add physical mailing address/unsubscribe handling, then create drafts from bryan@norcalcarbmobile.com.
